user_intent_prompt:
Context_Control. Place the required furniture in the livingroom. Keep all furniture inside the room, avoid overlap, and do not block doors or windows.

Architecture_Control. Follow the architecture condition image for room boundary, walls, doors, windows, clearance regions, and non-placeable regions.

Palette_Control. Generate a fixed-palette semantic layout only. Use the frozen category-to-color semantic palette. Draw each active furniture category with its assigned palette color only. Do not generate realistic texture, material, lighting, shadow, gradient, anti-aliasing, or unknown colors. Active semantic categories: the active furniture categories.
